condition_notes: One of the stranger and more beautiful arcade ideas — claim the field while the Qix coils and lashes. Taito's puzzler on Atari's CXL4027 (1982), among the more sought-after of the 8-bit computer carts. Loose, used, untested; from a single-owner estate. Loose cartridge (no box/manual); Atari 8-bit COMPUTER version, NOT the 2600 cart. Used and untested — sold as-is.
